sections.paragraph:
φυσιϰός, ή, όν [φύσις] ‘in accord with what is standard or to be expected for one entering the world as a living entity’

—a. natural, of sexual intercourse in accordance with structural design involving male and female φυσιϰὴ χρῆσις natural function Ro 1:26f.

—b. in the natural order of things, of animals destined by their very being for capture and destruction 2 Pt 2:12.
